task_completion.description: Navigate to the TailwindTraders project in Azure DevOps
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps web interface is visible, showing the 'TailwindTraders' project dashboard or Boards section.

task_completion.description: Import the 8 work items from the CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import success message or a list of newly created work items showing exactly 8 items (5 User Stories and 3 Bugs) added to the project.

task_completion.description: Ensure Title, Priority, Description, and Tags are correctly mapped
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work items list or individual item views display the correct titles, priorities (1, 2, or 3), and tags (e.g., 'frontend;e-commerce') corresponding to the imported items.

task_completion.description: Assign the 5 User Stories to the Sprint 2 iteration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Iteration' or 'Iteration Path' column/field for the 5 User Stories is explicitly set to 'Sprint 2' (or 'TailwindTraders\Sprint 2').

task_completion.description: Leave the 3 Bugs unassigned in the backlog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Iteration' or 'Iteration Path' column/field for the 3 Bugs is set to the default project root (e.g., 'TailwindTraders') and is NOT set to Sprint 2.

integrity.description: Agent used the Azure DevOps web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Azure DevOps web UI in a browser, rather than using API calls or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or scripts (e.g., PowerShell, Python, Azure CLI) are used to perform the import or update the work items.

integrity.description: Agent navigated the actual application menus
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Azure DevOps menus (e.g., Boards -> Work Items -> Import Work Items) and using the bulk edit or individual edit features.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV contains 8 items: 5 User Stories and 3 Bugs. User Stories: 1. Implement customer wishlist functionality (Priority 2, Tags: frontend;e-commerce), 2. Add multi-currency support for international checkout (Priority 1, Tags: payments;internationalization), 3. Build product recommendation engine (Priority 3, Tags: machine-learning;backend), 4. Create admin dashboard for order analytics (Priority 2, Tags: admin;analytics), 5. Implement real-time inventory sync with warehouse API (Priority 1, Tags: backend;integration). Bugs: 1. Shopping cart total miscalculates with percentage discounts (Priority 1, Tags: cart;critical), 2. Product image gallery fails to load on mobile Safari (Priority 2, Tags: mobile;frontend), 3. Search results return duplicate products after re-indexing (Priority 2, Tags: search;backend). User Stories must be assigned to Sprint 2. Bugs must remain in the backlog (unassigned to a sprint).
